data.acceptance:
1. Optional `secrets/recipients.signed.toml` file lists current operators and required quorum (e.g. M-of-N).
2. `thimble recipient add <app> <env> <new>` requires either:
3. A signature file `secrets/.add-<sha>.sig` containing detached signatures (age signing or sigstore) from at least M of the N current operators, or
4. `--bootstrap` flag, valid only when the namespace has fewer than 2 recipients (initial setup).
5. `thimble recipient list <app> <env>` prints fingerprints + signature status.
6. Tests: bootstrap path; M-of-N satisfied; M-of-N short-by-one rejected; signature over wrong recipient rejected.
